title: Genie Lamp
description: Magic Lamp that can give you any item you want for a huge price
body:
# Magic lamp that gives you any item you want for a huge price

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bcbVwzJwi6E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod adds a magical Genie Lamp that can give you ONE any item

Also you can disable specific items in Config

## Obtaining

Wandering trader can sell you one Old Lamp Scrap for 64 Emerald Blocks

![Wandering trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a735d7608590a7ecc18db863a274c3202c4bb038.png)

You can craft Old Lamp by combinig nine Old Lamp Scraps

![Old lamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fc85732c2ffe2d9c19039a35763f1588dc1564f.png)

From combination of Old Lamp and eight Blocks of Gold you get Golden Lamp

![Golden lamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78c35ed18b64632dea4bde7bb73e12a64f108b37.png)

And then the same step with Blocks of Lapis Lazuli gives you a Magic Lamp!

![Magic lamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c906fcaa2a42638542b358f463194a33d44e367.png)

Then you can charge it with 100 Experience levels (Configurable)

![Charging](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1e448decb11722a7fa26bb5794d92457bc05dd1.png)

And after this whole process you gets Empowered Magic Lamp that you can place and right click to wish for ONE any item

![Wishing for item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/870bf07f90ba650428abb9d64eb1ae97b1378297.png)

## Configurability

You can disable specific items and change the amount of levels required for charging the lamp

Default disabled items:

```
["minecraft:reinforced_deepslate", "minecraft:dragon_egg", "minecraft:end_portal_frame", "minecraft:bedrock", "minecraft:command_block", "minecraft:chain_command_block", "minecraft:repeating_command_block", "minecraft:command_block_minecart", "minecraft:jigsaw", "minecraft:structure_block", "minecraft:structure_void", "minecraft:debug_stick", "minecraft:light", "minecraft:barrier"]
```


Note: LIMITLESS version doesn't have any default disabled items

 
## Compatibility

Automatically shows all modded items which can also be disabled in config


[![Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7687f60c02535d479dc55156b8de1a776f63ebbb.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tejty)

[![Custom mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2e75104b0340c21d2685ed2d81a8ee8b1be0936.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tejty/commissions)
